source_contract: Legacy adam-core public transform_coordinates dispatcher, executed in the untouched legacy checkout. Values/errors are compared by the migration checkout without rerunning legacy.

cases.name: identity_cartesian_noop
cases.note: Early return when representation, frame, and origin are unchanged.

input.name: identity_cartesian_noop
input.note: Early return when representation, frame, and origin are unchanged.

cases.name: rust_cart_ec_to_sph_eq
cases.note: Cartesian input, non-Cartesian output, constant ecliptic->equatorial frame rotation.

input.name: rust_cart_ec_to_sph_eq
input.note: Cartesian input, non-Cartesian output, constant ecliptic->equatorial frame rotation.

cases.name: rust_sph_itrf93_to_geodetic
cases.note: Geodetic output branch with Earth-centered ITRF93 input.

input.name: rust_sph_itrf93_to_geodetic
input.note: Geodetic output branch with Earth-centered ITRF93 input.

cases.name: rust_kep_ec_to_com_ec
cases.note: Keplerian input path with t0/mu supplied to the Rust dispatcher.

input.name: rust_kep_ec_to_com_ec
input.note: Keplerian input path with t0/mu supplied to the Rust dispatcher.

cases.name: rust_com_ec_to_cart_ec
cases.note: Cometary input to Cartesian output; not the pure Cartesian frame-only fallback.

input.name: rust_com_ec_to_cart_ec
input.note: Cometary input to Cartesian output; not the pure Cartesian frame-only fallback.

cases.name: rust_noncart_origin_change
cases.note: Non-Cartesian origin change uses synthetic Cartesian metadata for translation vectors.

input.name: rust_noncart_origin_change
input.note: Non-Cartesian origin change uses synthetic Cartesian metadata for translation vectors.

cases.name: rust_cart_origin_change
cases.note: Cartesian origin change fused with representation conversion.

input.name: rust_cart_origin_change
input.note: Cartesian origin change fused with representation conversion.

cases.name: rust_itrf93_no_origin_change
cases.note: ITRF93 time-varying rotation followed by identity-frame representation conversion.

input.name: rust_itrf93_no_origin_change
input.note: ITRF93 time-varying rotation followed by identity-frame representation conversion.

cases.name: rust_itrf93_with_origin_change
cases.note: Origin translation plus ITRF93 time-varying rotation branch.

input.name: rust_itrf93_with_origin_change
input.note: Origin translation plus ITRF93 time-varying rotation branch.

cases.name: rust_covariance_constant_frame
cases.note: Finite covariance path through Rust forward-mode AD.

input.name: rust_covariance_constant_frame
input.note: Finite covariance path through Rust forward-mode AD.

cases.name: rust_covariance_itrf93
cases.note: Finite covariance with public ITRF93 dispatcher branch.

input.name: rust_covariance_itrf93
input.note: Finite covariance with public ITRF93 dispatcher branch.

cases.name: fallback_cartesian_frame_only
cases.note: Intentional fallback: pure Cartesian 6x6 frame rotation is faster in Python/NumPy.

input.name: fallback_cartesian_frame_only
input.note: Intentional fallback: pure Cartesian 6x6 frame rotation is faster in Python/NumPy.

cases.name: fallback_cartesian_origin_only
cases.note: Intentional fallback: Cartesian output with origin change adds no fusion win.

input.name: fallback_cartesian_origin_only
input.note: Intentional fallback: Cartesian output with origin change adds no fusion win.

cases.name: fallback_noncart_itrf93_input
cases.note: Non-Cartesian input into ITRF93 frame change must route through Cartesian fallback.

input.name: fallback_noncart_itrf93_input
input.note: Non-Cartesian input into ITRF93 frame change must route through Cartesian fallback.

cases.name: mixed_origin_preserve
cases.note: Mixed input origins with no requested origin_out preserve per-row origins.

input.name: mixed_origin_preserve
input.note: Mixed input origins with no requested origin_out preserve per-row origins.

cases.name: mixed_origin_to_single_origin
cases.note: Mixed input origins translated to a single target origin.

input.name: mixed_origin_to_single_origin
input.note: Mixed input origins translated to a single target origin.

cases.name: observatory_origin_to_sun
cases.note: MPC observatory-origin translation branch in _resolve_origin_translation_vectors.

input.name: observatory_origin_to_sun
input.note: MPC observatory-origin translation branch in _resolve_origin_translation_vectors.

cases.name: geodetic_identity_noop
cases.note: Geodetic input is allowed for identity/no-op returns.

input.name: geodetic_identity_noop
input.note: Geodetic input is allowed for identity/no-op returns.

cases.name: error_unsupported_coordinate_type
cases.note: Initial TypeError branch for non-coordinate input.

input.name: error_unsupported_coordinate_type
input.note: Initial TypeError branch for non-coordinate input.

cases.name: error_invalid_frame_out
cases.note: frame_out validation branch.

input.name: error_invalid_frame_out
input.note: frame_out validation branch.

cases.name: error_invalid_origin_out_type
cases.note: origin_out type validation branch.

input.name: error_invalid_origin_out_type
input.note: origin_out type validation branch.

cases.name: error_invalid_representation_out
cases.note: representation_out validation branch.

input.name: error_invalid_representation_out
input.note: representation_out validation branch.

cases.name: error_geodetic_non_identity_transform
cases.note: Geodetic input is not implemented for non-identity transforms and must fail loudly.

input.name: error_geodetic_non_identity_transform
input.note: Geodetic input is not implemented for non-identity transforms and must fail loudly.
